findings.title: No active sprint exists — SPRINT-2026-05-B never created, now 17 days overdue
findings.detail: SPRINT-2026-05-A ended 2026-05-20 incomplete. SPRINT-2026-05-B was committed to in the 2026-05-21 reconciliation but as of 2026-06-07 no file exists. Every milestone remains unstarted with no active work queue.
findings.fix_sketch: Sebastian + Esme must author a new SPRINT-2026-05-B. Cannot be auto-generated without fabricating scope.

findings.title: KR2 deadline (2026-05-27) is 11 days past with no MISSED marker — KPI.md still reads 'at-risk'
findings.detail: KPI.md KR2 was marked 'at-risk' but the deadline passed 11 days ago unmet. KR1 and KR4 were correctly marked MISSED in the 2026-06-04 audit but KR2 was missed.
findings.fix_sketch: Mark KR2 as MISSED, set confidence to 0.

findings.title: KR3 deadline (2026-06-10) is 3 days away, KR2 prerequisite missed, no warning in KPI.md
findings.detail: KR3 depends on KR2 which is missed. KR3 will also be missed in 3 days. No banner or update warns of this.
findings.fix_sketch: Mark KR3 as MISSED, set confidence to 0, add to OKR warning banner.

findings.title: STATUS.md 'In flight' shows stale 2026-06-04 entry 3 days later
findings.detail: STATUS.md showed audit/nightly-2026-06-04 as 'commit and push pending' three days after the audit session. Stale and misleading for the next agent.
findings.fix_sketch: Move the 2026-06-04 entry to Done with actual merge note. Update footer.

findings.title: ROADMAP.md footer timestamps stale — shows 2026-05-30 despite 2026-06-04 modifications
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md footer and frontmatter timestamps were not updated when the 2026-06-04 audit modified the file.

findings.title: INTEGRATIONS.md frontmatter still references superseded ADR-0006 instead of ADR-0011
findings.detail: ADR-0006 was superseded by ADR-0011 on 2026-06-04. INTEGRATIONS.md frontmatter related_adrs not updated.

findings.title: NON_GOALS.md frontmatter related_adrs still lists ADR-0004 — wrong citation body was fixed in last audit
findings.detail: The 2026-06-04 audit fixed the body of NoGo-1 but the frontmatter related_adrs still lists ADR-0004 which covers sprint strategy not productization scope.

findings.title: RISKS.md R-006 still contains undefined 'Phase B decision' jargon
findings.detail: The 2026-06-04 audit fixed the same jargon in INTEGRATIONS.md but RISKS.md was not updated.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace 'Phase B decision' with traceable reference to IFleet model routing decision 2026-05-12.

findings.title: ROADMAP.md Open Questions Q3 cites superseded ADR-0006 instead of ADR-0011
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md Q3 open question footer still says 'per ADR-0006'. ADR-0006 was superseded by ADR-0011 on 2026-06-04.

findings.title: M-026 referenced in RISKS.md R-013 but does not exist in ROADMAP.md
findings.detail: RISKS.md R-013 references 'planned M-026' but ROADMAP.md only goes to M-024. Workers looking up M-026 find nothing.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace 'planned M-026' with 'not yet scoped — planned post-[M-024]'.

findings.title: KPI.md frontmatter/footer timestamps stale — show 2026-05-26 despite 2026-06-04 edits
findings.detail: KPI.md was modified in the 2026-06-04 audit but its frontmatter and footer timestamps were not refreshed.
findings.fix_sketch: Update frontmatter last_updated and footer to 2026-06-07.

findings.title: CHANGELOG.md has no 'Added' entry for ADR-0011
findings.detail: ADR-0011 was created on 2026-06-04 but only the index update was noted, not the file addition.

findings.title: CHANGELOG.md initial entry claims ENV.md has '24 vars across 7 categories' — now 9 categories and 31+ vars
findings.detail: Stripe and Documenso sections were added in 2026-05-26 audit but the initial scaffold entry was not corrected.
findings.fix_sketch: Add a Changed note or update the scaffold entry.

findings.title: CHANGELOG.md claims 14 third-party integrations but actual count is 13
findings.detail: INTEGRATIONS.md has 13 named third-party services, not 14. The scaffold entry over-counted.
findings.fix_sketch: Add a Changed note noting the correct count of 13.

findings.title: RUNBOOK.md postmortem template references docs/postmortems/ directory which does not exist
findings.detail: RUNBOOK.md line 102 says postmortems live at docs/postmortems/. No such directory existed.

findings.title: FILE_STRUCTURE.md references docs/templates/ directory which does not exist
findings.detail: FILE_STRUCTURE.md references docs/templates/ as destination for new file templates but the directory didn't exist.
